steps.title: Use a two-point table
steps.content: The line passes through $(0,18)$ and has slope $5$. In slope-intercept form $f(x)=mx+b$, this means $m=5$ and $b=18$.

steps.title: Write the equation using slope-intercept form
steps.content: Therefore $$f(x)=5x+18.$$ The matching choice is the only option with slope $5$ and $y$-intercept $18$. The other choices either use the wrong slope or the wrong intercept, so D is correct.
